summary: Completed comprehensive UI testing of Streamlit Drilling Campaign Cost Estimator app. All 5 multipage navigation pages working correctly: Upload Data, Build Artifacts, WBS Tree, Modelling, and Audit. App runs on port 8501 without errors.
seed_data_creation: None - existing processed data in /app/data/processed/ used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streamlit app running on port 8501. All 5 pages tested: Upload Data (file uploader with xlsx/xls/csv support, sheet selection), Build Artifacts (BUILD ARTIFACTS button, pipeline config), WBS Tree (tree visualization with field selector, campaign tier selector), Modelling (campaign inputs sidebar, CALCULATOR tab, well parameters), Audit (shows info message when no result). Processed artifacts exist in /app/data/processed/. Raw data files in /app/data/raw/.
